
======================================
✅ MATCH: Slug: amzn-in, Name: Amazon India, Action Count: 13
======================================
Actions:
  * ID: 45d94cee-fb7b-40c9-8a91-431a63120f33
    Name: Buyback Offers
    Desc: Returns buyback and trade-in offers for a product with exchange values.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "asin",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0CY2R1G3G",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Product ASIN to fetch buyback/trade-in offer tiers for"
  },
  {
    "name": "encrypted_merchant_id",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "AJ6SIZC8YQDZX",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Encrypted merchant identifier for the product listing on Amazon.in"
  },
  {
    "name": "product_subcategory",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "14700226",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Buyback product subcategory code used in the offers-for-category query"
  },
  {
    "name": "brand",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "HP",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Product brand name sent in the buyback offers query"
  },
  {
    "name": "rbn_hierarchy_nodes",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "14700226",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Retail browse node hierarchy identifier for buyback category matching"
  },
  {
    "name": "product_price",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "54990",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Product price in INR used to calculate buyback offer tiers"
  }
]

  * ID: 90fa8872-2845-41d8-b439-0de67bb261b9
    Name: Category Browse Listing
    Desc: Returns products in a category with titles, INR prices, images, and ratings.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "category_node_id",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "1375424031",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Amazon browse node ID for the category listing to fetch (e.g. Laptops department)"
  }
]

  * ID: c1915b4d-5e99-4626-a6ff-5f11924c8196
    Name: EMI Plans
    Desc: Returns EMI financing plans by bank with tenures, monthly amounts, and rates.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "asin",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0CY2R1G3G",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Product ASIN to fetch EMI and no-cost EMI financing options for"
  }
]

  * ID: 8a4e734e-8e0f-442b-8030-a3aa6745e47b
    Name: Homepage Gateway
    Desc: Returns homepage content including recommendation widgets, deals, and navigation.
    Params: []

  * ID: 123a365c-9359-4989-8408-2fdf511c8f37
    Name: Live Broadcast
    Desc: Returns live-shopping broadcast details with featured product segments and ASINs.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "broadcast_id",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "6b4a8188-b8e7-452f-9849-4decfe82fdc2",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Amazon Live broadcast UUID to fetch product segments and stream metadata for"
  }
]

  * ID: 04dc7d01-b8ec-4880-a442-cfa576720d6e
    Name: Merchandised Category Listing
    Desc: Returns merchandised category tiles and product links for a browse node.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "category_node_id",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "29887845031",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Amazon browse node ID for the category listing to fetch"
  }
]

  * ID: c6860f68-c44b-4e7a-b4ba-2d54ab4d96e2
    Name: Navigation Menu
    Desc: Returns the top-level navigation menu with departments and category links.
    Params: []

  * ID: 18439f91-e8a4-414f-9712-d92c8d25b827
    Name: Navigation Subcategories
    Desc: Returns subcategory menu items with titles, node IDs, and links.
    Params: []

  * ID: e1360267-6e2b-48f2-b6b2-b633ac681e44
    Name: Product Collection
    Desc: Returns titles, prices, and availability for a batch of product ASINs.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "asins",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0F44L54CM,B0F89JDLB3,B09NP47KT4",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Comma-separated Amazon product ASINs to fetch in a single batch request"
  }
]

  * ID: caf4cece-ccac-4c3e-9184-cad245ade14b
    Name: Product Details
    Desc: Returns product details for an ASIN: name, brand, price, images, and rating.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "asin",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0CY2R1G3G",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product to load"
  }
]

  * ID: a0bfbcc8-58c7-41b8-b09f-d8df4ba4b59b
    Name: Related Products
    Desc: Returns related and similar products for a product with titles, prices, and images.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "encrypted_lazy_load_request",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Encrypted lazy-load render token from the PDP related-products widget"
  }
]

  * ID: a71dadee-6336-4a4a-98fc-96571fbc6ed5
    Name: Search Results
    Desc: Returns search results for a query with titles, INR prices, images, and ratings.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "search_query",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "laptop",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Search keyword query (maps to the k= parameter on Amazon.in search)"
  },
  {
    "name": "rh_filter",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "n:1571271031,n:214332266031,n:1968024031",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Amazon rh refinement filter string narrowing results to category nodes"
  },
  {
    "name": "sort_order",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "apparel",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Sort order key for search results (e.g. apparel, price-asc-rank)"
  }
]

  * ID: ee87269a-8a06-4465-a617-8acaaf963a1d
    Name: Variant Pricing
    Desc: Returns per-variant prices, savings, and availability for a product's variants.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "asin_list",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0F5WDDGQK,B0F5WKTV36,B0F5WDCNNK,B0F5WFSLX6,B0F5WF6WH6,B0F5WDYZMD,B0F5WJM4QH,B0F5WF5ZBW",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Comma-separated list of variant ASINs in the twister matrix"
  },
  {
    "name": "parent_asin",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0F66BQ6BP",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Parent ASIN grouping all color/size variants"
  },
  {
    "name": "landing_asin",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "B0F5WDCNNK",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Currently selected variant ASIN shown on the product page"
  },
  {
    "name": "qid",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "1780330011",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Search query ID extracted from prior search results page for twister context"
  }
]


======================================
✅ MATCH: Slug: flipkart, Name: Flipkart, Action Count: 5
======================================
Actions:
  * ID: 756c753b-224c-4280-b5e2-8a9a2d666e99
    Name: Add to Cart
    Desc: Adds a product to the authenticated user's cart and returns the updated cart.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "product_id",
    "type": "string",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Flipkart product ID, e.g. MOBHFSCEW8DQVKDZ"
  },
  {
    "name": "listing_id",
    "type": "string",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Flipkart listing ID, e.g. LSTMOBHFSCEW8DQVKDZ2CWXCB"
  },
  {
    "name": "quantity",
    "type": "string",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Quantity to add"
  },
  {
    "name": "price",
    "type": "string",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Product price for payload (optional)"
  }
]

  * ID: 7792288b-be7d-41c4-a102-698e77f6503d
    Name: Cart Contents
    Desc: Returns the authenticated user's cart with items, quantities, prices, and totals.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "pincode",
    "type": "string",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Delivery pincode"
  }
]

  * ID: 3831641d-58ee-43d5-bf8e-27f13886db28
    Name: Flipkart Get Product
    Desc: Fetches a Flipkart product page and returns structured data: title, MRP, description, product highlights, and full specifications. Pass any flipkart.com /p/ URL.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "product_url",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "https://www.flipkart.com/maybelline-new-york-call-me-colossal-bold-eye-kit/p/itme0d5a653ce45c",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Full Flipkart product page URL (must contain flipkart.com)"
  }
]

  * ID: 8c3f1e7c-b5de-44e4-a05a-8cca6bf3f32d
    Name: Product Details
    Desc: Returns full product data including specifications, pricing, and images.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "product_url",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "https://www.flipkart.com/apple-iphone-15-black-128-gb/p/itm6ac6485515ae4?pid=MOBGTAGPTB3VS24W&lid=LSTMOBGTAGPTB3VS24WCTBCFM",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Full Flipkart product URL with pid param"
  },
  {
    "name": "pincode",
    "type": "string",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Delivery pincode"
  }
]

  * ID: 0e12eaf5-5a4a-4c99-aaa6-b978bcb82a5e
    Name: Product Search
    Desc: Returns products matching a query with titles, prices, ratings, and review counts.
    Params: [
  {
    "name": "query",
    "type": "string",
    "default": "iphone",
    "required": true,
    "description": "Search keyword, e.g. iphone 15, oneplus"
  },
  {
    "name": "pincode",
    "type": "string",
    "required": false,
    "description": "Delivery pincode"
  }
]
